title: Bitter Lasagna with Portuguese Cheese
description: A unique twist on the classic Italian dish, featuring bitter greens and Portuguese cheese.

ingredients.name: Mellow greens (such as chard or beet greens)
Portuguese cheese (such as Queijo de Cabra)
Bitter greens (such as kale or collard greens)

instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped mellow greens and bitter greens, and cook until wilted.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, wilted greens, and shredded cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional cheese.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
